General.Name: Elmos Semiconductor SE
General.Description: Elmos Semiconductor SE develops, manufactures, and distributes microelectronic components and system parts, and technological devices for automotive industry in Germany, other European Union countries, the Americas, Asia/Pacific, and internationally. The company provides motor control IC solutions, which includes stepper motor controller IC, brushless DC motor controller IC, and DC motor controller IC; sensor ICs, such as ultrasonic distance IC, sensor signal processor IC, integrated absolute pressure system IC, optical IR sensor IC, ToF imager, and passive infrared IC; and LED driver ICs, such as high voltage, liner LED, and LIN RGB controller ICs. It offers DC/DC converter IC; low dropout (LDO) regulator; and interface ICs, which includes PSI5, LIN/CAN, and KNX transceiver. In addition, it offers ASIC design, automotive safety IC, engine management IC, and relay driver ICs. It serves automotive and non-automotive applications comprising smart home and industrial automation applications. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Leverkusen, Germany.
